description: Citation rate: every answer to a factual Q&A pair must include at least min_citations cited entities. Baseline 1.0 means 100% of answers must have at least one citation — no uncited answers allowed.

examples.question: How does a claim move from PENDING to PAID status?
Which repository class handles prior authorization lookups?
What SQL query fetches active network providers for a given plan?
How is member eligibility verified before a claim is adjudicated?
What service is responsible for calculating network gap scores?
Which classes are involved in processing an 835 EDI remittance file?
How does the enrollment service handle mid-year plan changes?
What database tables are written to when a provider is onboarded?
How are duplicate claims detected and rejected?
Which component owns the benefits accumulator logic for deductibles?
